Properties.SellingText: "Hi, I am trader <NAME>\nI am selling <GOODS>.\nYou can pay with <PAYMENT>."
"Welcome to QuantumSTAR! We've got the best deals on high-end electronics and computer systems this side of the galaxy!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"

"Welcome to TOP Distributors! We've got drinks, snacks and worker contracts. If you've got the goods, we also have some patrons that'll be interested in some high-end merchandise. So what'll it be?\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome to Artemis Commodities! Lowest prices on this planet!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome to Bertram's. I'm not the man himself, but I am his cousin! I can get you a pretty sweet deal on weapons and commodities if that's your jam!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome to Ok'Y Medical Care! I am doctor Su'oul and I am licensed to offer you medicines and injectors compatible with Terran physiology.\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome to Grimgar's Garden. I am Aunt Mary, the proprietor. My name is not actually Mary and I have no idea where the name came from.\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome to Inter-Weapon! I'm Barj, I handle all new customers. So what are you lookin' for there, buddy?\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome to SERVANT CORP Hardware and Utilities. We sell the latest in suit enhancements and attachments. So if you need anything, I am you servant.\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome to M.A Corp. We are a subsidiary of Polaris Megacorp, but don't hold that against us!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome to Market Cafe bar and grill. We have everything from burgers to salads. But if another one of you Terrans asks for ketchup, you're going out on your ass!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"This is Pax-Purgatory. We have a bit of everything, from energy boosters and drinks, to crew contracts.!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"How's it going? I'm an amateur cook, trying to sell my wares. You interested?"
"We offer nearly all kinds of resources!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"We're not a big place like Ok'y Medical, but if you need treatment? We have what you need!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome to Agrinex Incorporated! We supply many of the leading pharmaceutical companies, labs and factories with high-quality ingredients not found anywhere else!"
"Searching for a particular seed?\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"We are serving your basic crafting needs.\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"We are serving your basic weaponry needs.\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Want to upgrade your weapons? You're at the right place!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Want to upgrade your suit? We offer a selection of boosters!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome, Valued customer! I'm a supplier of industrial supplies for spacestations and habitats if you're interested!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"

"I'm in charge of procuring supplies for this place. If you need a little money and can help me cut down on import costs, you come to me.\nIf you know of a waste disposal site, you can make a tidy profit transporting waste too."
"You look like someone up to no good. That's just the kind of person i'm looking for!"
"Welcome to Treiaz Mining! Our mining company is selling basic ores for a good price for both industrial and private users!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Hey there! We're from the Miravella Mining Company and we deal primarily in high-end ores for industrial and commercial buyers at the lowest prices!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Hey there! We're from the Miravella Mining Company and we deal primarily in high-end ores for industrial and commercial buyers at the lowest prices!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome to Faeros Metal Extraction. I hope you don't mind the heat, this place can get over 700 degrees some days, so we've got injuries on a regular basis."

"I'm not supposed to spawn anymore. If you see this trader in a POI, please report it to the Developers of Reforged Galaxy and Eden and in which POI and planet-type.\nI have been replaced with better traders that give missions."
"Check out our latest products! We are also searching for rare artifacts!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"What we do is mostly confidential. But we are sure you can handle it!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"We are always in demand of supplies. Those strangers strolling around here might look for jobs, though.\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome to the premium market! If we do not have it, no one will! Sure, it's a bit pricey but you can't beat our selection!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome to our settlement. We're always in need of fresh supplies and some of the youths are looking for jobs."
"Finally! A freighter! We've been low on supplies for a while now and we'd been getting worried."
"We're not a very well-funded site here. We could do with anything you can spare. We'll even part with some of the less important things we've uncovered."
"Wow, you came all the way out here to this place? Most people just contact me through my comms than come to me in person.\nSo what can Com-Hazard Processing do for you today?"
"You don't look like one of our regular suppliers. This is a restricted area. Hurry up with your business and be on your way."
"You don't look like one of our regular suppliers. This is a restricted area. Hurry up with your business and be on your way."
"You don't look like one of our regular suppliers. This is a restricted area. Hurry up with your business and be on your way."
"Hand over your reports and leave. You didn't see us, we didn't see you. None of us were here."

"Welcome honorable customer! Would you like to see our showroom or our catalogue? We have many great deals here, yes?\nIf you've ordered one of the limited edition Boyband posters, I'm afraid we're not allowed to sell them officially."
"You look like you're out for a good time, right? I might have some things you may be interested in as long as you keep this to yourself."
"Refining is our business!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"The buying, selling and exchanging of information is my business. The question is, are you a customer or not?"
"Welcome to Bertram's Arms! We deal in civilian armaments and outdoors equipment. If it can fit in your pocket, we'll hane it.\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome to SERVANT CORP Clothing and Utilities. We sell the latest in clothing, suit enhancements and attachments. So if you need anything, I am your servant.\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome to SERVANT CORP Hardware and Utilities. We sell the latest in suit enhancements and attachments. So if you need anything, I am your servant.\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome to Inter-Wep! I'm Barj, I handle all new customers. So what are you lookin' for there, buddy?\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome to Inter-Weapon Heavy. We specialize in weapons and ammunition for ships here, with a bit aside for the big gun enthusiasts. \n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome to Ok'Y Medical Care! I am doctor Su'oul and I am licensed to offer you medicines and injectors compatible with Terran physiology.\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"I welcome you to Andromedical! The leading producer of medical supplies in the galaxy! Not even Ok'y can compete!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome to Grocer's Grove. We supply nothing but the freshest produce!.\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"We're currently having a sale on seedlings, saplings and hydroponics units! Get yours today!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome to M.A Corp. We are a subsidiary of Polaris Megacorp, but don't hold that against us! We currently have deals on mining equipment and refined metals.\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome to M.A Corp. We are a subsidiary of Polaris Megacorp, but don't hold that against us! We currently have deals on mining equipment and refined metals.\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"We're almost to capacity, Terran! You'd better be handling a shipment and not wasting my time."
"We're almost to capacity, Terran! You'd better be handling a shipment and not wasting my time."
"I'm looking for a supplier of standard weapons. That wouldn't happen to be you, would it?"
"My warehouses are currently empty and i'm looking to... restock my wares. If you know what I mean?"
"I won't ask any questions if you don't.\nI don't know what condition your products are in, so don't complain about the prices."
"Hey buddy, can you do me a favor and sell me any armors you don't need? I can't fill out this order with what I have on hand."
"You want something? I have the info if you've got the creds. I'm also in the market for good info if you found anything worthwhile..."
"It's no secret that I work for Polaris. I'm sure you can guess what i'm looking for: Information on the competition."
"I work for the Miravella Mining Company. We're buying up any and all information you may have stumbled across related to exploration and mining."
"There's no use hiding the fact that I work for the House of Epsilon. With tensions rising between the Xenu and Ghy'st we need to head off any unwanted escalations early."
"Markos says you're good. You got anything we can use for any jobs?"
"We're out on the frontier so it's hard to get supplies this far from civilization. We're welcome to any support you can offer, though we can't store too much ourselves."
"We're out on the frontier so it's hard to get supplies this far from civilization. We're welcome to any support you can offer, though we can't pay much we have a lot of mouths to feed."
"We grow most of our own food here. It ain't much, but it's honest work."
"This is only a small spaceport, not much need for anything more than some maintenance equipment and replacement parts"
"I'm limited to only minor treatments that occur to this colony's residents. Supplies are limited, so anything serious will need to be seen to at a major hospital."
"We don't get a lot of freighters out here besides the regular supply runs. If you've got parts to spare, I could use all the help I can get to keep this tub running."
"If you're in here, you keep your weapons holstered at all times. We have enough problems with local wildlife and local thugs, so we make all our own weapons and ammunition."
"There's plenty of old wrecks we can break down for parts to expand the colony, and what we can't use we can always sell."
"Welcome, Welcome!\nI've just opened for the day, so i'm well-stocked on anything you might need out on the frontier."
"Welcome to P3: Polaris Planetside Production. We're always happy to have customers down here on our little planet. We're a low-priority site so we're behind on raw materials."

"Welcome to Zero Horizons Manufacturing, a subsidiary of Polaris Megacorp. We mostly handle Zero-G construction and cold welding here, so you're sure to find more complex devices here than planetside."
"Hey there, pal! Welcome to Non-Linear Productions. We're the best at top-of-the-line industrial manufacturing and supply."
"Ah, a customer! What can I do for you today? Here at Arriake Technology we manufacture only the finest optronics and advanced electronics for your ship."
"Welcome to Chromium-Sierra Sciences! We're producers of the finest scientific and medical equipment this side of the galaxy!"
"Hello there, valued customer! Welcome to Thermal Interactions Ltd! We currently have a sale on heat exchangers and coolant!"
"Welcome to Hostile Apparatus. We're the leaders in robotics manufacturing and one of Polaris' top contributors. Buy one of our Mechanoids today!"
"Business has been slow recently. You have no idea how glad I am to see a customer! Welcome to Solaris AMP, the premier supplier of generators, solars and electrical devices!"

"Welcome to PentMaxIt! The number one provider of Pentaxid-based fuel services in the entire Galaxy!\nWe operate here as a major production hub for the company here, so we have our share of logistics problems."
"I don't know what you need here, but this is a WORK SITE! If you don't have any business with me, then stay out of my way!\nWe deal in gas extraction from that Gas Giant and not much else."
"Welcome to InterWeapon Manufacturing. This is the factory floor where we produce our ammunition and weapons."
"Look, I'm busy enough as it is. Tell me what chemicals you're after and i'll put in a shipping order and get your order out there now."
"Welcome to Vitalife Pharmaceuticals. We supply many of the leading pharmaceutical companies, labs and factories with high-quality ingredients not found anywhere else!"
"We produce and manage the stuff we sell at our showrooms here. We don't usually handle sales, so anything in the crates is staying in the crates."

"Welcome to the factory floor of our brewery. I assure you we are NOT a distillery and I can't tell you how much I hate it when people call us one.\nThat's not to say we don't have a distillery, because we do. But this isn't it. We stock their products though."
"This is a Hydroflux Pumpstation. I don't know what you need here, we mostly pump, treat and package water for colonies."
"This is only a small spaceport, not much need for anything more than some maintenance equipment and replacement parts"
"Woah there, watch your step or you'll end up toasted by a freighter's backblast. You here for maintenance or to unload cargo?"
"Yeah, I can probably do something with your ride. Nothin' fancy thanks to a shortage of parts, but better than nothing."
"Welcome to Lighthalzen Biolabs. We do cutting edge experiments here in the hopes of improving lives across the galaxy."
"Ah, A Customer! Welcome to Imperial Arms. We don't discriminate here, we provide standardized Imperial weapons at discount prices!"
"We're at half-speed at the moment. You here to resupply us so we can finish the current job?"
"We handle metal processing here. I know, not very special but what did you expect? We buy ore and sell raw ingots, alloys and pure components at a discount.\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"We handle metal processing here. I know, not very special but what did you expect? We buy ore and sell raw ingots, alloys and pure components at a discount.\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"We handle metal processing here. I know, not very special but what did you expect? We buy ore and sell raw ingots, alloys and pure components at a discount.\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Alright, so what is it you need? Iron mining is the backbone of the galactic economy. We've got a quota to meet and our backers don't like us slacking."
"Alright, so what is it you need? Copper's used in pretty much everything, so we've always got a big quota to meet and our backers don't like us slacking."
"Alright, so what is it you need? What? Why are we mining quartz? Don't you know that almost all silicon comes from quartz?"
"Alright, so what is it you need? Aye. We mine Cobalt here. We have buyers in Polaris, the Trade Guild and even the Zirax Empire."
"You're not one of our regular buyers. What brings you out here to our mine?"
"You're not one of our regular buyers. What brings you out here to our mine? We supply Titanium ore to most of the refineries in this quadrant."
"This is about as boring as mining can get. Bauxite isn't hard to mine, but it's usually spread wide and thin."
"We're still trying to clear out this deposit, but it's a big bugger and is fighting us the whole time."
"We're going through drill heads every few hours trying to crack this damn vein. We can't even use laser drills on the damn stuff since it's so reflective."
"We've hit paydirt, but the toxicity of this deposit is making me worried for my men."
"It's a slow day today. Most days are slow like this one when you're dealing with Pentaxid. This crap will cook you from the inside out if you're not careful."
"We've cleared nodes in grid A-23, A-24 and B-11 today. Surveys of grid B-12 came back as Neodymium decay. So that one's a bust."
"We've not had much success this quarter. I know there's gold here, but we may have to move the dig site to the west and risk rougher terrain. All we're finding out here is Copper."
"We've burned out a dozen heatsinks on our mining lasers getting through this latest deposit. Must be very pure to put this much strain on our drills."
"We've hit the jackpot here, but we don't have the equipment to dig it out any faster until we can sell what we've got and buy better infrastructure."
"We've had an uneventful job this time around. 'Eventful' in this line is never a good thing. Graphite is always in high demand in refineries and factories."
"Salt maybe low in value, but we can always sell it so the price is stable. Not like metal-extraction that can put people out of business with shifting prices."
"We're always hoping for rare ores, but Sulfur is what we're really here for. There's a big market, even though the stuff is easy to get. I guess the locale isn't for everyone."
"Welcome to Plumas Ice Mining! Sounds like a real company, don't it? We supply water and reaction mass to any friend of the clans!"
"It might seem strange to you, but we make quite a living selling what we can salvage from the wreckage around here. Just the parts stripped from a Mk.33 Hull will have us set for a month."
"Welcome to the Rusty Barrel. We're not ALL pirates here. Some of us have to work for a living, just like the folks in the Empire."
"Yes, I know we don't have much. No, we don't stock Zyme. I can't believe I went to medical school for this...\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Bienvenido al Ammo Bandito!\nWe have the widest range of ammunition this side of darkspace!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"I take it you have some goods to sell me? I'm sure I can find a buyer for most things... I've got a few of my own looking for a new home too..."
"I only deal in quality merchandise. I buy and I sell... Sometimes I need supplies for the wellbeing of my merchandise."
"I got all the stuff, if you've got coin. What's your poison? Wire? Zyme? Black Ice?"
"We're running a smooth operation here. Some of the more unique components are harder to come by than others, but the Syndicate is more than willing to pay for good supplies."

"Welcome to Pulsar MAX! We have the greatest collection of video games, anime, comics and trading cards this side of the galaxy! We're selling some common cards and can always find a buyer for the rarer cards if you have any!"
"Welcome to GS-Entertainment! We're a leading retailer of video games, anime and card games. We also broker deals with collectors and hold TCG Tournaments!"
"Uhh... Hey, how can I help you? We've got a new line of manga in and the new Empyrion TCG Booster Packs are out if you're into that sort of thing."

"Welcome to ArkBank! Most of our services are automated by ATMs these days, but there's always a need for a physical presence for some exchanges.\nWould you like to exchange any valid currency or bullion in the vault?"
"Don't like how your weapon handles from the factory? We've got upgrades and mods to customize your weapons to your preferences!"
"Want your work to be the best it can be? We've got the latest in tool and tech mods on the market!"
"I welcome you Traveller. As a friend of the tribe, I am proud to offer my wares for you to purchase. \n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome traveler! How may we serve you? \n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Tena koe te tangata haere. What can I do for ya, bro? \n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Greetings, outsider. I am Tahl'Vahr the shaman of this tribe. I have many restoratives you will not find elsewhere at an affordable price. \n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Greetings, outsider. I am Shal'Tham a traveling medicineman. I have many restoratives you will not find elsewhere at an affordable price. \n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Greetings Traveller. I am Ab'thar and I run this tannery where I produce only the highest quality leather that's in great demand, even beyond this world. \n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Hail, Stranger! Come to see my kills or my skills? I will pay you well for the spoils of your hunt too, my friend."
"There's plenty of rare finds out in the bush... if you know where to look that is. I'll be heading back out there shortly. \n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Friend! Look at what my farms have produced! Have you not seen anything as glorious? \n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Greetings and welcome to my workshop. As you can see, I work primarily in wood to turn out furniture better than any constructor."
"Hail, Traveller! What brings you to the quarry? We mine whatever we can pull from the ground and sell what we cannot use to the Trade Station."
"Hail, Traveller! You must be thirsty! Although Polaris has tried to compete, no one can beat the authentic products of us Tal'on.\nStay awhile, try some of our brews and talk to us of the galaxy."
"Greetings Friend. I am but a simple farmer with not much to offer, but i'm willing to share the fruits of my labor... for a price of course!"
"There are no happier bees than the ones in my care. Do you hear that buzzing? That's my little friends hard at work making honey!"
"Taking care of so many large beasts is a tough job, but it is a rewarding way of life I must admit."
"We've got a surplus of wood around here, if you've got the coin, Traveller."

"Hey you! Are you from maintenance to fix my light? The flicker is giving me a headache! Head through the door behind me, the access code is 8544. Try not to break anything while you're back there, will ya?"
"Affordable space travel is only a few credits away!"
"Welcome to Helios Foundation!"
"I buy ore to refine into ingots. If you're looking to purchase ingots, check on the lower levels. I also sell a refinery license that allows access to the use of our furnaces."
"I sell refined ingots. If you're looking to sell your ore, go check upstairs. I also sell a refinery license that allows access to the use of our furnaces."
"Welcome to the Sanctuary! I hope the dust isn't too much of a problem for you? I will gladly take any supplies you no longer have need of."
"We sell power cells."
"Welcome to my farm, traveler! You can buy my oranges and sell them in the nearby villages. I'm also looking for farming supplies if you have any to spare."
"Sell for profit: [c][FFFFFF]Fertilizer[-][/c] \nBuy for profit: [c][FFFFFF]Sugarcane[-][/c]"
"Sell for profit: [c][FFFFFF]Fertilizer[-][/c] \nBuy for profit: [c][FFFFFF]Corn[-][/c]"
"Sell for profit: [c][FFFFFF]None[-][/c] \nBuy for profit: [c][FFFFFF]Leather[-][/c]"

"The Zirax have begun raiding one of our ancient tombs! I fear they will steal our ancient relics! Please, traveler, go to our tomb and recover our relics before the empire gets their hands on them. I will pay well for their safe return."

"Filthy pirates have been seen near our sacred tomb! The tomb contains ancient relics sacred to both the Sun and Moon clans. Find the relics inside the tomb before the looters do, and I will pay you handsomely for returning them to me."

"Welcome to our village. I currently have a shortage of Space Oranges and would pay handsomely for them. Many of the nearby farms sell them. If you are an honored ally, I will also purchase gold coins at a better price."
"Welcome to Bodger's Blacksmithing, traveler."
"Welcome to my humble shop, kind traveler. Feel free to browse!"
"Greetings, traveler. Have you come to purchase honey from my bees?"

"Greetings, traveler, and welcome to my brewery! Our last shipment of spices and natural sweetener hasn't come yet. We would appreciate any assistance. You can find beekeepers who sell Natural Sweetener in the jungle."
"The Karana welcomes any friend of the Zirax Empire. We are distributors of the finest drinks in the galaxy and are always looking to restock our supply."
"We sell plates and buy ingots."
"Sell for profit: [c][FFFFFF]Toxic Waste[-][/c] \nBuy for profit: [c][FFFFFF]None[-][/c]"
"Test"
"We've been hard at work digging up ore."
"We've been hard at work digging up ore."
"We've been hard at work digging up ore."
"We've been hard at work digging up ore."
"We've been hard at work digging up ore."
"We've been hard at work digging up ore."
"We've been hard at work digging up ore."
"We've been hard at work digging up ore."
"We've been hard at work digging up ore."
"We've been hard at work digging up ore."
"We've been hard at work digging up ore."
"We've been hard at work digging up ore."
"I will take any bio-organic samples off your hands."
"I will take any technological samples off your hands."
"I will buy technical artifacts or unwanted schematics. \nPlease speak to the lead researcher nearby if you have data chips to turn in."
"I collect relics of ancient civilizations to learn who they were, what their lives were, and why they went extinct."
"Thank you for freeing me, friend. Before you go, do you have any bandages so I may heal my wounds?"
"Finally! What took you so long? Give me a weapon, so that I may rain down destruction upon those who have wronged me. For the glory of the empire!"
"Finally! I'm free! Can you spare any equipment so that I may contact my people?"

"At X Corp, we pride ourselves on being leader of the pack when it comes to mining and salvaging technologies. We've recently created a prototype drill and you can be the first to get your hands on it, assuming you have the credits."
"If you got the cred, I got the goods."

"A client is expecting a delivery of [c][FFFFFF]1x Cargo Box 3[-][/c] to the Polaris Argent Headquarters on an Ice planet in the outer rim. You'll pay 50k collateral now, and be paid 200k upon delivery. [c][FFFFFF][i]Mission items can be stored as cargo but do not place them down as a block.[/i][-][/c]"
"I'm waiting for a friend."
"Welcome! I thank you again for your assistance with our problem earlier."
"Welcome to our research vessel! I sell various useful supplies.\nI will buy technical artifacts or unwanted schematics. Please speak to the lead researcher nearby if you have data chips to turn in."
"Welcome to our research vessel! I deal with exploration supplies and reports that you obtain from scanning or expeditions."
"I deal with buying and selling schematics. If you have any spare schematics you no longer need I will take them off your hands."
"We will gladly sell you our ore. If you happen to have any mining supplies or reports we'll purchase them from you."
"Eden_TraderCobaltinfo"

"Eden_TraderCobaltinfo"

"Eden_TraderCobaltinfo"
"Eden_TraderCobaltinfo"
"Welcome! Welcome! We don't have much out here but take a look!"
"Welcome to our scrapyard. You may purchase a salvaging license that allows access to salvage a single wreck by flipping the override switch on the core lock."
"Find an insignia of a wanted individual?"
"Find an insignia of a wanted individual?"
"Find an insignia of a wanted individual?"
"Find an insignia of a wanted individual?"
"Find an insignia of a wanted individual?"
"Find an insignia of a wanted individual?"
"Welcome the Scrapyard Trader for SV parts!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome the Scrapyard Trader for building blocks!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"Welcome the Scrapyard Trader for Base and CV parts!\n<DISCOUNTTEXT>"
"You have proven yourself a friend of the empire. That does not make us friends, but I am required to do business with you. Watch yourself."
"I buy and sell trading freqency reports that can help you find a specific factory or trade station."
"Hi there, hello. Welcome to Holo-Corp, the official Federation holographic sign manufacturer and distributor.\nMay I interest you in the newest in holographic posters and advertisements?"

"Terrarite is used to help manufacture freighter warp fuel and we are running low in this sector. I don't need to remind you how important it is for the economy for freight to keep moving.\nYou can obtain Terrarite Ice from rich ice asteroids in the region of Solitude. You will need specialized mining equipment to do so however.\nI am authorized to give a lucrative discount to those honored with the guild."

"Our supply of Nitronite Ice is running low. This is an important component in many industrial manufacturing processes.\nYou can obtain Nitronite from rich ice asteroids in the region of Solitude. You will need specialized mining equipment to do so however.\nI offer a very favorable discount to those honored with us."

"Got any Cerulian Dust Ice? Who cares why I want it. What matters is do you want to make some quick cash?\nYou can obtain Cerulian from rich ice asteroids in the region of Solitude. You will need specialized mining equipment to do so however.\nI might even be able to cut you a better deal, if you've proven yourself."

"The Empire is in need of Ferrite Ice as it has an important use in our weapons manufacturing plants. Do you have any?\nYou can obtain Ferrite from rich ice asteroids in the region of Solitude. You will need specialized mining equipment to do so however.\nThose honored with the Empire shall be recognized."

"Hydronite Ice has many applications from mining and industry to medical and ship propulsion systems. We are in short supply in this sector. If you have any we can make it worth your time.\nYou can obtain Hydronite from rich ice asteroids in the region of Solitude. You will need specialized mining equipment to do so however.\nIf you are recognized among us you will get a better price."
"I will purchase rich ore or advanced trading goods."
"I will purchase rich ore or advanced trading goods."
"I will purchase rich ore or advanced trading goods."
"I will purchase rich ore or advanced trading goods."
"I will purchase rich ore or advanced trading goods."
"Welcome to our humble home in space, traveler. It might not be much to look at but it's home."
"Welcome to our farm."
"Welcome to our factory."
"Welcome to our oxygen harvester."
"Welcome to our mining vessel."
"Welcome to our fuel refinery."
"We don't pay as much as other places but we might be more convenient for you."
"Welcome to our habitat."
"Welcome to our brewery."
"Welcome to our livestock farm."
"Welcome to our refinery."
"Welcome to our smeltery."
"Welcome to our water harvester."
"Welcome to our robotics factory."
"Welcome to our optronics factory."
"We don't pay as much as other places."
"Welcome to our habitat."
"Welcome to our food factory."
"Welcome to our hotel."
"Welcome to our jewelry factory."
"Welcome to our advanced factory."
